scripts.dev: concurrently 'bun run autodoc' 'bun register-type' 'bun bundle-runable' 'bun bundle-runable-min' 'bun bundle-esm' 'bun bundle-runable-to-bss-temp'
scripts.bundle-runable: bun build ./dev/bsxIIFE.mjs --format iife --banner '/*! alpinejs@3.15.8 with, x-intersect, BSX (x-a, x-listen, x-param, x-dispatch, x-clear, x-toast, x-onresponse), and ungap-custom-elements */' --watch --outfile ./dist/bsxjs.js
scripts.bundle-runable-min: bun build ./dev/bsxIIFE.mjs --format iife --banner '/*! alpinejs@3.15.8 with, x-intersect, BSX (x-a, x-listen, x-param, x-dispatch, x-clear, x-toast, x-onresponse), and ungap-custom-elements */' --minify --watch --outfile ./dist/bsxjs.min.js
scripts.bundle-esm: bun build ./dev/bsxESM.mjs --format esm --banner '/*! alpinejs@3.15.8 with, x-intersect, BSX (x-a, x-listen, x-param, x-dispatch, x-clear, x-toast, x-onresponse), and ungap-custom-elements */' --watch --outfile ./dist/bsxjs.mjs
scripts.bundle-runable-to-bss-temp: bun build ./dev/bsxIIFE.mjs --format iife --banner '/*! alpinejs@3.15.8 with, x-intersect, BSX (x-a, x-listen, x-param, x-dispatch, x-clear, x-toast, x-onresponse), and ungap-custom-elements */' --watch --outfile C:/Users/Hakim/AppData/Local/Temp/ext-tmp/1000/shared/bsx-0-1-5-bsx.js
